port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima del Pacífico, S.A. de C.V.
port_metadata.vessel_dimension_source: Vessel Tonnage Certificate issued by competent authority

geographic_scope_and_terminals.limits: Jurisdictional waters of the Port of Tampico
terminals: All terminals within the jurisdictional waters of the Port of Tampico
Terminals under the National Port System Administration (ASIPONA) Tampico

calculation_definitions.basic_quota: The dollar rate obtained from 'tariff_matrix_per_vessel' corresponding to the vessel's Gross Register Tonnage (TRB).
calculation_definitions.indicated_quota: Equivalent to the 'basic_quota'; used as the base for late cancellation fees.
calculation_definitions.said_quota: Equivalent to the 'basic_quota'; used as the base for post-movement cancellation fees.
calculation_definitions.stipulated_quota: Equivalent to the 'basic_quota'; used as the base for waiting time fees.
calculation_definitions.movement_time_definition: Defined as 20 minutes before the hour indicated in the service request
calculation_definitions.time_measurement_start: Starts when lines are given/received or when the tug is ready at the agreed location as per the pilot
calculation_definitions.time_measurement_end: Ends when lines are cast off or as indicated by the pilot

rate_table.definition: Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket
Serves as the base quota for vessels in this size bracket

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Applicable charge is 70% of the total amount of the maneuvers

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Bow Thruster Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.vessel_equipment_specific: Vessels using an operational Bow Thruster and effectively using only one tug
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: 10% discount applied to the matching 'basic_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Additional Time / Overtime
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Charge is 25% of the matching 'basic_quota' for every 15-minute increment beyond the first hour

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given within one hour before tug movement (Requested Time - 20 mins)
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: 25% charge of the matching 'indicated_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: User desists from service once tugs have started moving
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: 75% charge of the matching 'said_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Waiting / Standby Time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Tugs must wait due to causes imputable to the user
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.basis_unit: Per hour or fraction of wait time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: 25% of the matching 'stipulated_quota' per hour of wait, starting from the hour indicated in the request

vessel_specific_exclusions.note: Authorized increments for 2025 do not apply; these vessels are billed under the tariff in office DGP.-1287/2024 dated April 4, 2024
Not subject to fixed rates; subject to negotiation based on international maritime customs

administrative_and_billing_rules.notice_period: Service must be requested in writing at least 3 hours in advance during provider office hours
administrative_and_billing_rules.duration_limit: Basic rate covers a maximum of one hour
administrative_and_billing_rules.payment_requirement: Estimated amount must be covered at the time of request; final adjustment made upon invoice presentation
administrative_and_billing_rules.dispute_resolution: Controversies and unprovided cases are resolved by the General Directorate of Ports of SEMAR
